sorting.name: Sorting
sorting.description: Algorithms that arrange elements in a specific order
sorting.whenToUse: Use when you need to order data for efficient searching, display, or further processing.

searching.name: Searching
searching.description: Algorithms for finding elements in data structures
searching.whenToUse: Use when you need to locate specific elements in arrays, trees, or graphs.

data-structures.name: Data Structures
data-structures.description: Fundamental structures for organizing and storing data
data-structures.whenToUse: Use to understand the building blocks of efficient programs.

dp.name: Dynamic Programming
dp.description: Optimization technique for solving complex problems
dp.whenToUse: Use when a problem has overlapping subproblems and optimal substructure.
